F

Torval-Mastopolos Mining

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3307-08-10 · 5 mentions
Active: 3307-08-10 → 3307-10-01
Description

Torval-Mastopolos Mining is a major Imperial mining corporation formed through the merger of Senator Zemina Torval's personal mining interests and the Mastopolos Mining corporation. The company controls extensive mineral extraction operations across Imperial space and beyond, benefiting from both Torval's senatorial influence and Mastopolos's established industrial infrastructure. It is one of the largest employers in the Empire's extractive sector.

The corporation became a flashpoint in 3307 when Senator Torval accused Mastopolos Mining of financial irregularities and attempted to dissolve the partnership. The dispute escalated into a public corporate conflict, with both sides mobilising political and economic resources. The affair exposed the fragility of alliances between Imperial nobility and corporate interests, even as it demonstrated the substantial power that individual Senators wield over galactic commerce. Torval-Mastopolos Mining remains active, though the internal tensions between its founding partners have never been fully resolved.

Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3307-10-01
Torval Loses Control of Mastopolos Mining
Senator Zemina Torval is removed from the Mastopolos Mining board of directors and loses her majority shareholder position, while her daughter Constantia announces Torval-Mastopolos Mining has been elected as the controlling authority of LTT 198.
3307-08-26
Mining Campaign Success for Zemina Torval
Torval-Mastopolos Mining outperforms Wreaken Construction in the LTT 198 resource campaign, securing permanent corporate control and a new starport construction contract.
3307-08-19
LTT 198 Hosts Competing Mining Campaigns
Torval-Mastopolos Mining and Wreaken Construction request mined resource deliveries in LTT 198. The more successful corporation will establish a permanent starport.
3307-08-16
Rival Corporations Compete in LTT 198
Torval-Mastopolos Mining and Wreaken Construction both establish headquarters in the LTT 198 system, escalating their long-standing corporate rivalry.
3307-08-10
Zemina Torval Creates New Corporation
Senator Zemina Torval establishes Torval-Mastopolos Mining, an autonomous offshoot of Mastopolos Mining, signaling a potential rift with CEO Gabriella Mastopolos.
